	Stolní rameno RODE PSA1+ je profesionální studiové mikrofonní rameno určené pro profesionální nahrávání zvuku. Jeho paralelogramová pružinová konstrukce se stará o plynulé polohování mikrofonu. items.desc: Hibakód olvasó ANCEL VD700 OBD-II - VAG:ANCEL VD700 is an advanced diagnostic code reader designed specifically for Volkswagen vehicles, including VW, Audi, Skoda and Seat. It offers comprehensive diagnostics of all maj…
items.raw_desc: Hibakód olvasó ANCEL VD700 OBD-II - VAG:ANCEL VD700 is an advanced diagnostic code reader designed specifically for Volkswagen vehicles, including VW, Audi, Skoda and Seat. It offers comprehensive diagnostics of all major vehicle systems and helps with routine maintenance. The diagnostic device is an improved version of the previous ANCEL VD500 and brings even more options to VAG owners. Thanks to its versatile features, the VD700 enables in-depth diagnostics of systems such as ABS, SAS, SRS, ESP, TPMS, transmission, motor, immobiliser and batteries. It can effectively detect vehicle problems and prevent potential faults, helping to keep the car in perfect condition. This makes it easy for VAG owners to diagnose any problems without having to visit an authorised workshop. In addition to diagnostics, the VD700 also offers a range of service functions for routine maintenance. These include throttle adaptation, resetting the brake pads, Resetting TPMS tyre pressure sensors, steering angle calibration, Reset the oil service interval, injector coding...
